title.en: Define and Maintain Role-Based Access Control

prose.en: Define and maintain role-based access control, through determining and documenting the access rights necessary for each role within the enterprise to successfully carry out its assigned duties. Perform access control reviews of enterprise assets to validate that all privileges are authorized, on a recurring schedule at a minimum annually, or more frequently.
Role-based access control is defined and maintained, through determining and documenting the access rights necessary for each role within the enterprise to successfully carry out its assigned duties.
Access control reviews of enterprise assets are performed to validate that all privileges are authorized.
Reviews are performed on a recurring schedule, at a minimum annually, or more frequently.
